revision.comment: [[Template:EstcatCountryDecade]] no longer needs year parameters, replaced: {{EstcatCountryDecade|17|8|18th|Japan}} → {{EstcatCountryDecade|Japan}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (1 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
